title: pavonia hassleriana
intro: Pavonia hassleriana, also known as the Rose Mallow, is a flowering plant species in the family Malvaceae, native to the subtropical regions of South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pavonia hassleriana include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its leaves and flowers are used in folk medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
